variables.input: fetch logs | filter isNotNull(`nova.site`) | summarize by:{`nova.site`} | fields site = `nova.site`
fetch logs | filter isNotNull(`nova.line`) | summarize by:{`nova.line`} | fields line = `nova.line`

0.content:
# Nova MES — Business Overview
Manufacturing execution KPIs derived from OpenTelemetry business-event logs (`event.name` / `nova.*`). Batch release (line-2) and weigh-and-dispense (line-3).

1.title: Value Released (USD)
1.query:
fetch logs
| filter `event.name` == "batch.release.completed"
| filter in(`nova.site`, array($site)) or $site == ""
| summarize `Value Released` = sum(`nova.batch.value_usd`)

4.title: Batch Release Success Rate
4.query:
fetch logs
| filter `event.name` == "batch.release.completed" or `event.name` == "batch.release.failed"
| summarize success_rate = countIf(`event.outcome` == "released") * 100.0 / count()

5.title: Value Released Over Time by Product

6.title: Batch Outcomes

7.title: First-Pass Yield by Line (%)
7.query:
fetch logs
| filter `event.name` == "batch.release.completed"
| summarize fpy = countIf(`nova.batch.first_pass` == true) * 100.0 / count(), by:{`nova.line`}
| sort fpy desc

8.title: Batch Release Failures by Stage
8.query:
fetch logs
| filter `event.name` == "batch.release.failed"
| summarize failures = count(), by:{`nova.failure.stage`}
| sort failures desc

9.title: Units Released by Product
9.query:
fetch logs
| filter `event.name` == "batch.release.completed"
| summarize units = sum(`nova.batch.quantity_units`), by:{`nova.product.name`}
| sort units desc

10.title: Dispense Tolerance Conformance by Material (%)
10.query:
fetch logs
| filter `event.name` == "dispense.weighed"
| summarize conformance_pct = countIf(`nova.dispense.within_tolerance` == true) * 100.0 / count(), by:{`nova.material.name`}
| sort conformance_pct desc

11.title: Dispense Throughput Over Time
11.query:
fetch logs
| filter `event.name` == "dispense.completed"
| makeTimeseries dispenses = count()

12.title: Avg Net-Weight Deviation by Material (kg)
12.query:
fetch logs
| filter `event.name` == "dispense.weighed"
| summarize avg_deviation_kg = avg(`nova.dispense.deviation_kg`), max_deviation_kg = max(abs(`nova.dispense.deviation_kg`)), by:{`nova.material.name`}
| sort avg_deviation_kg desc

13.title: Recent Business Events
13.query:
fetch logs
| filter isNotNull(`event.name`)
| sort timestamp desc
| fields timestamp, `event.name`, `event.outcome`, `nova.site`, `nova.line`, `nova.product.name`, `nova.material.name`, `nova.batch.value_usd`, `nova.failure.stage`
| limit 100
